posts.name: Lev8
posts.tagline: Find, research, and reach the right people
posts.description: Chat with Lev8, the fastest way to find and reach your target people and companies, powered by live web search via parallel AI agents across every corner of the internet. Enrich CSVs with waterfall lookups, monitor intent signals, and send personalized multi-channel messages, all running automatically.

posts.name: CartAI
posts.tagline: The AI agent that handles checkout.
posts.description: Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

posts.name: ditto.site
posts.tagline: Clone any website into clean code. Free & open source
posts.description: Point Ditto at any public URL and get a faithful copy as clean, componentized Next.js or Vite code, in minutes. It's fully deterministic, so it's fast, cheap, and consistent. Components, tokens, interactions & hover states included. Free REST API + MCP server, open source.

posts.name: Rerun
posts.tagline: The easiest way to build AI agents for all your tasks
posts.description: Most AI agents are black boxes. Rerun isn't. Build no-code agents that run 24/7, chasing invoices, qualifying leads, clearing your inbox, and watch every step in real time. They pause for approval before anything sensitive. Each workspace gets its own private server. Start with the included model, or connect your own API key or subscription

makers.name: Théo Louro
makers.headline: I help SaaS through their growth phase

posts.name: Phantomstory
posts.tagline: Launch a third-party blog to win AEO with just two clicks
posts.description: Phantomstory helps teams win AEO by launching third-party blogs on fresh domains in under 5 minutes. With just two clicks, Phantomstory provisions credible content hubs that incrementally publish AI-search-ready articles. The secret? A portion of these expertly-written articles are designed to help LLMs discover, understand, and recommend your company. Stop thinking about AEO as just a monitoring problem; with Phantomstory, transform AEO into an actionable plan that actually drives results.

posts.name: Routine AI
posts.tagline: Control work with your voice. The Siri for work.
posts.description: Routine AI lets you control your tasks, calendar, notes and projects using your voice. Just talk naturally to schedule meetings, add reminders, capture ideas, write notes, search your knowledge, update projects and automate repetitive work.

posts.name: Jockey by TwelveLabs
posts.tagline: The video AI agent that understands your whole library
posts.description: Jockey is the first AI that understands your entire media library just like you do, searching by person, moment, or context across every photo and video you've captured. Powered by TwelveLabs' advanced model stack, Jockey improves automatically with every update. Whether you need to connect via MCP for Claude/ChatGPT or build custom applications using our API, Jockey makes your media library instantly searchable and accessible.

posts.name: CreateOS Sandbox
posts.tagline: Instant, hardware Isolated Sandboxes for AI agents
posts.description: CreateOS Sandbox gives AI agent builders their own fast, secure, hardware isolated, sandbox in ~30ms (p90). We have suit of CLI, SDK, 50+ SDK real world examples, claude plugins, computeSDK integration, and more

posts.name: Skim
posts.tagline: Free, open-source AI email client for Windows
posts.description: Skim is a free, open-source (MIT) email client for Windows. ✂️ Minimal on purpose: no calendar, no rules engine, no bloat. Fewer buttons, less cognitive load. ⚡ Native Rust core (Tauri 2): ~5 MB installer, sub-second cold start, instant full-text search. 🔒 Local-first, offline-ready, zero telemetry. ✦ AI on your terms: bring your own Anthropic or OpenRouter key and Skim drafts replies in your voice and answers questions across your whole mailbox.

posts.name: Manifest
posts.tagline: Turn any webpage into an action manifest for AI agents
posts.description: Manifest turns any webpage into a structured JSON map of what an AI agent can click, fill, and submit. One API call, no fragile selectors. Every action comes with resolved CSS/role locators, plus a requires field that encodes dependencies between elements (e.g. "select a plan before this button is clickable"). That's context aria snapshots don't give you. Python SDK, LangChain support, and an MCP server included. Built for anyone shipping browser agents.

posts.name: Bolna Agent Studio
posts.tagline: Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes
posts.description: Bolna's Agent Studio lets any business build and deploy a production-grade voice AI agent in minutes, no prompt engineering. Upload a doc or answer a few guided questions, and Studio assembles a call-ready agent from production-tested modules. Sign up and start calling on Day 0.

posts.name: Topolines
posts.tagline: Generate Topologic contours
posts.description: Draw a zone, generate crisp topographic contour lines, and export print-ready SVG & HD PNG. Gradients, elevation taper and Figma-ready output.

posts.name: OpenChatCut
posts.tagline: Open-source AI agent video editor with a real timeline
posts.description: OpenChatCut is an open-source ChatCut alternative: local-first AI video editing where Codex, Claude, and MCP agents work on a real multitrack timeline. Free, editable exports, AGPL.

posts.name: tterm
posts.tagline: A terminal, a real browser, and Claude Code under one roof
posts.description: tterm is a macOS cockpit for working with Claude Code. Every project is a row of explorer, Claude, and file viewer. Stack as many as you're juggling. A real Chromium browser lives inside, and there's no editor on purpose: you review diffs hunk by hunk and commit. It even rebuilds itself. Ask the Claude pane for a feature and the running app hot-reloads with it. No account, no telemetry. Free for hobbyists, on Apple silicon.

posts.name: Routebase
posts.tagline: Catch API drift before your customers do
posts.description: Your API lives in your design tool, your docs, your mocks, your tests, your monitoring — and every copy drifts. Routebase makes them one living source: change the spec, publish, and it catches what drifted. (Your AI agents read the same source over MCP.)

posts.name: Universal Dictation on Stream
posts.tagline: Private Voice Ring for dictation across iOS & Mac
posts.description: Introducing Universal Dictation on Stream. Push-to-talk across iOS and Mac: Instantly. No app switching, no reconnection. We built Notes so nothing gets lost, and Chat so you can think out loud. With Dictation, your voice goes anywhere. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one voice ring

posts.name: DualStream
posts.tagline: Simultaneous desktop and mobile streaming, the easy way.
posts.description: Beautifully powerful streaming. Astonishingly easy. DualStream brings Desktop and Mobile audiences your content at the same time, from a single patent-pending engine. DualStream Relay carries your broadcast to every platform from our servers — and if your connection blinks, disconnection protection keeps your stream alive. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips, cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in.

posts.name: Tidy
posts.tagline: Your Mac tidies itself: screenshots, installers, Downloads
posts.description: Tidy lives in your menu bar and handles three chores you keep doing by hand. It archives new Desktop screenshots, renaming them from their content with on-device OCR — "Screenshot 14.22.10.png" becomes "invoice-march.png". It ejects thedmg you mounted and trashes the installer. It sorts new Downloads by type, with rules you write in plain English. Apple Intelligence builds them on-device, so nothing leaves your Mac. Only touches new files. Never deletes. $9 once, no subscription.

posts.name: PieceKeeper

The service is free to use, offers a full-suite platform, and exports smoothly to software like KiCad and Altium, allowing users at any skill level to fully optimize their hardware designs.

posts.name: MeetIsland

posts.tagline: Turn GL into AI-powered US GAAP financial statements

Architecture is scalable, and every amount drilled down to journal entry.

posts.name: ADA
posts.tagline: An open-source data analyst that shows its math
posts.description: I tried to automate a data analyst. Contribute to sainesrop in a CSV or Excel file. ADA cleans it, builds a dashboard, flags anomalous periods, projects a guarded forecast, and answers questions about your data. The difference: every chart, every forecast, every chat answer traces back to a pandas calculation you can actually read. Nothing is a black box. Optional AI only ever sees your column schema, never your rows, and the whole product works with no API key. MIT Licensed (want contributors)

Its MCP server turns your workspace into memory for Claude, ChatGPT & Cursor — agents read live tasks, project memory, and decisions instead of being re-briefed every chat. Free plan, no credit card.

posts.name: Listiq AI
posts.tagline: The AI that reports the dents instead of retouching them
posts.description: Every AI photo tool "enhances" cars by hiding rust and smoothing dents. Listiq AI does the opposite: it's never allowed to lie about the car. Drop a photo on our homepage and watch four AIs work: Identify it (make, model,generation), check it for damage (every visible flaw, with severity), decode its VIN (specs + open recalls from NHTSA), then let the AI stage it on the background that sells it best — the car itself stays pixel-honest. Free, no signup, photos never stored.

posts.description: DocxPacer types your Word (.docx) draft into a Google Doc keystroke by keystroke, at a natural human pace — bursts, pauses, even the odd typo-and-fix — not one jarring paste. Set a speed in WPM, or choose how many words, over how long; it types in the background, stops at your target, and resumes next session. Free types plain text; Pro keeps your formatting (bold, italic, underline, alignment) and can paraphrase your lines with AI as it types.

posts.name: Fishing Outfitter
posts.tagline: Spend more time on the water, less time on paperwork.
posts.description: Fishing Outfitter is an all-in-one management platform built for fishing guides, fly shops, and charter operators. posts.name: printqr

posts.description: printqr turns QR code generation from a manual, one-at-a-time chore into a webhook-triggered background process. Install on Shopify and every new product automatically gets a QR code generated and attached as a product image — no clicking a generator, no remembering to do it. A direct API with a bulk endpoint (500 codes/call) covers catalog imports outside Shopify. Free to try (100 renders/month), $9/mo for the API with bulk generation, $19/mo for full Shopify webhook automation.

posts.name: TickerNotch
posts.tagline: Live tickers in the dead space around your MacBook notch
posts.description: TickerNotch is a native Swift app that turns your MacBook's notch into a live ticker bar: your watchlist and position P&L on one side, scrolling RSS news headlines on the other, plus price alerts that fire native notifications. Click a ticker to open a candlestick chart with built-in indicators, and run several side by side. Signed, notarized by Apple, auto-updates, no account, no data sharing. 7-day full trial, then free forever (with some limitations); Pro $5/mo or $40 lifetime. macOS 14+.

So here’s CatchMeUp, get a complete catch-up of what happened what was discussed important points, etc. in perfect, short and sweet way rather than wasting your time reading each and every message. Export Chat without media →Choose Time Range → Gives you Complete Catch-up → Ask any Follow-up Questions.

For teams, it supports shared inboxes, assignments, deadlines and team digests. Stop checking every email. Start acting on what matters.

posts.name: Pliow
posts.tagline: SDK and runtime for dynamic software interfaces
posts.description: Pliow provides the SDK and runtime for dynamic software interfaces, to help B2B SaaS teams give every user a personal interface generated on their existing codebase, without a custom engineering cycle. We are moving software beyond one-size-fits-all: instead of shipping one screen for everyone, you ship your shared primitives and each user gets their own interface, generated on request or learned from how they work, compiled, policy-checked and sandboxed per user before it goes live.

posts.name: Ledger One — invoices & agreements

It measures ripeness, which correlates with sweetness — a phone, not a lab. Rate one after cutting and the scale re-fits to your melons. Free, no signup.

posts.name: Unstated.com.au

Built specifically for Victorian disclosure. It's information, not legal advice, and always points back to a professional. One report is $29, with bundle pricing also available.

Most fitness apps throw an overwhelming amount of raw data at you, but they rarely make it easy to compare today's run against the exact same loop you ran yesterday. That's why I built Ten Miles — a focused, clean iPhone app designed for runners and walkers who want meaningful insights without the bloat.

posts.name: PXINK
posts.tagline: Stop overpaying for Claude tokens: Save by picture prompts
posts.description: Pxink is a free, 100% client-side utility built to optimize AI API spend. AI models like Claude and Gemini bill text tokens by density, but vision tokens strictly by image dimensions. Pxink leverages this quirk by wrapping massive text blocks or codebase logs into highly dense 1928px PNGs. The model's OCR reads the text perfectly, but your total token bill drops by roughly 60%.
